chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Appl. No. 845 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 20.02.2024 Syed Qasim Ali Shah Musavi, Advocate for applicant Mr. Shahzado Dreho, Advocate for respondent No.2 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG *********** Through the instant Crl. Misc. Application, the applicant has challenged the impugned order dated 16.11.2022 passed by the learned Sessions Judge/Justice of Peace, Sukkur in Crl. Misc. Application No. 3230/2022, whereby application filed by the applicant U/S 22-A & 22-B Cr.PC was dismissed. Learned counsel for the respondents files objection along with certain documents, which are taken on record. Heard and perused. From the perusal of para No.4 of the impugned order, it reflects that there appears dispute in between the parties over the share of property which is civil in nature and same is pending adjudication before the Court of 1st Senior Civil Judge, Sukkur. The applicant by converting civil litigation into criminal has approached the Court for registration of false FIR so as to put pressure upon the respondents. The Justice of Peace has discussed each and every aspect of the case and passed a speaking order which does not require any interference. No illegality or any infirmity has been committed by Justice of Peace while passing the impugned order. Under such circumstances, the instant Crl. Misc. Application stands dismissed and the impugned order is hereby maintained. JUDGE M.Ali/steno*
